texto: Well, how we going to sleep with that going on?" his wife demanded, not unreasonably. "Are they making love, or are they sore at each other, or are they just suffering down there?"("I Wouldn't Be In Your Shoes")
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de William Irish que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Well, how we going to sleep with that going on?" his wife demanded, not unreasonably. "Are they m…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, cats, going, com foco em reflexao.
